issues.description: Filter uses ByName for 'Whitebeard Pirates', but card text specifies filtering by type inclusion ('type including "Whitebeard Pirates"'), not by name. Should use ByType or ByCardType filter.

SearchDeck does not capture the 'look at 5 cards from top' constraint. The action should specify a deck search scope of 5 cards from top, or this requires a separate Peek/Look action before the search.
Action is missing the 'up to 1' quantity constraint. Should specify maxResults:1 or equivalent to limit selection to 1 card.
Missing action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. The DSL must include a second action or mechanic to handle deck ordering of non-selected cards.
